basic_details.job_title: EdCIL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 34 Consultant, Project Associate and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Principal Chief Consultant, Chief Consultants, Senior Consultants, Consultants, Project Associates
basic_details.short_information: EdCIL TSG Samagra Shiksha Consultant Recruitment 2026: Get the latest EdCIL (India) Limited recruitment notification 2026 for 34 positions of Principal Chief Consultant, Chief Consultants, Senior Consultants, Consultants, and Project Associates on Contractual basis for the Technical Support Group – Samagra Shiksha Project (TSG – SS Project) under the Ministry of Education, Government of India. The online application process starts on 6th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 20th May 2026. Apply through the official EdCIL careers page at https://www.edcilindia.co.in/. You can also get

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated via email to shortlisted candidates

application_fee.details: No fees are required to be paid for application for the aforesaid posts. All candidates can apply free of cost through the official EdCIL careers page.

age_limit.age_details: Full-time Contractual basis; Place of work: New Delhi
age_limit.details: The upper age limit must not be more than as indicated against each post as on 31st March 2026. Candidates must ensure they fulfill the age criteria as on the specified date before applying.

qualification.details: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. The prescribed qualifications and post-qualification experience should be acquired on or before 31st March 2026. Qualifications should be from Govt. recognized institutions. Candidate should have strong oral & written communication skills with excellent working knowledge of computer (MS Word, MS Excel & PowerPoint etc.) and presentation skills. In case of false or insufficient information or lack of proof to ascertain eligibility, candidature will be summarily rejected at any stage of the selection process. | Educational Qualification and Experience - Position-wise

vacancy_details.Designation & Area: Principal Chief Consultant - Finance and Procurement and Monitoring
Chief Consultant - NCF, Multilingualism, Text Book
Chief Consultant - PARAKH & Assessment, HPC, SSSA
Senior Consultant - Access and Infrastructure Development
Senior Consultant - RTE Policies and Entitlements
Senior Consultant - Aspirational Districts, EODB, ABP, Vidyanjali
Senior Consultant - Event Management (Pariksha Pe Charcha, National Teacher Awards, Swachh Vidyalaya Puraskar)
Consultant - Monitoring, Research and Evaluation (Monitoring Institutions, Social Audit)
Consultant - NEP 2020, Samagra Shiksha Policy & Planning
Consultant - Data & Strategy Unit, MIS, Data Analysis, PRABANDH, DBT
Consultant - Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) under Samagra Shiksha
Consultant - ECCE and FLN (NIPUN Bharat Mission)

selection_process: Stage 1 – Shortlisting Screening of online applications based on academic/professional qualifications and post-qualification experience.
Stage 2 – Interview Shortlisted candidates called for interview; date and details communicated via email only. Original documents to be produced at the time of interview.
The selection process will be based on academic/professional qualifications

post-qualification experience and will also include an Interview as may be decided depending on the total number of eligible applicants. Merely fulfilling the eligibility criteria does not entitle a candidate to be called for Interview. Call letters and intimations connected with this recruitment will be sent only to shortlisted candidates by email as provided in the online application form. A waiting list will also be prepared for each category so that if a selected candidate does not join or a consequential vacancy arises
suitable candidates from the waiting list will be given the opportunity to join. Documents to prove qualifications
etc. have to be produced in original when called for the Interview.
how_to_apply: Only online applications will be accepted through the official EdCIL careers page at https://www.edcilindia.co.in/TCareers. Online application form is available from 06.05.2026 and the last date of receipt of application is 20.05.2026. Candidates applying for more than one post should submit separate application(s) for each post. Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. The place of work for all selected candidates will be New Delhi. The advertisement number and online application number may be noted for future reference.

In addition to the above-mentioned vacancies, interested candidates may also register and submit their profiles on the Online Resource Pool Portal at https://tsgrecruitment.edcil.co.in/ which shall remain active/live on a rolling basis throughout the year. Candidates shall be considered for relevant vacancies subject to meeting the eligibility criteria as and when vacancies arise for future requirements.
Documents to be Uploaded (PDF format only):
Any other relevant documents as per the post applied for
Documents to be Produced in Original When Called for Interview:
All educational qualification certificates and marksheets
Post-qualification experience certificates clearly indicating period and nature of experience
Any other documents as required by EdCIL
For any query, candidates may write/contact at: [email protected]
important_instructions: Only online applications will be accepted - candidates applying for more than one post must submit separate applications for each post. Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. The engagement of all selected candidates is purely on contractual basis - it will not vest any right to claim regular appointment or permanent absorption in the organization. Prescribed qualifications and post-qualification experience must be acquired on or before 31st March 2026 from Govt. recognized institutions. Age limit and experience will be counted as on 31st March 2026. All documents (education, post-qualification experience, photograph, resume etc.) must be uploaded only in PDF format. Candidates working in Government organizations/PSEs/Autonomous bodies must route their application through proper channel if their department rules require so. No application fee is required for any post. Call letters and intimations will be sent only to shortlisted candidates by email - applicants must ensure the email ID given in the online application is maintained in active mode. Merely fulfilling the eligibility criteria does not entitle a candidate to be called for Interview. In case of false or insufficient information or lack of proof to ascertain eligibility, candidature will be summarily rejected at any stage of the selection process. The posts and number of positions are only indicative and any post can be upgraded or downgraded at any time without notice. Vacancies are subject to change without any notice. EdCIL reserves the right to cancel/withdraw/postpone this recruitment notice and the competent authority reserves the right of any amendment, cancellation, and changes to this advertisement without assigning any reason or notice. Interested candidates may also register on the Online Resource Pool Portal (https://tsgrecruitment.edcil.co.in/) for future vacancies on a rolling basis throughout the year.

faq.question: Q1. What is EdCIL TSG Samagra Shiksha Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: EdCIL TSG Samagra Shiksha Consultant Recruitment 2026 is a contractual recruitment drive by EdCIL (India) Limited for 34 posts of Principal Chief Consultant, Chief Consultants, Senior Consultants, Consultants, and Project Associates for the Technical Support Group – Samagra Shiksha Project under the Ministry of Education, Government of India, New Delhi.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced under EdCIL TSG SS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 34 positions have been announced across five levels – 01 Principal Chief Consultant, 03 Chief Consultants, 05 Senior Consultants, 17 Consultants, and 08 Project Associates; these are indicative and may be upgraded, downgraded, or changed without prior notice.

faq.question: Q3. What are the online application dates for EdCIL TSG Samagra Shiksha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application portal for EdCIL TSG Samagra Shiksha Consultant Recruitment 2026 opens on 06 May 2026 and the last date for submission of online applications is 20 May 2026, as mentioned in Advertisement No. 01/2026/EdCIL-TSG/SS.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for EdCIL TSG SS Consultant and Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: The upper age limit as on 31 March 2026 is 55 years for Principal Chief Consultant (Code 101), 45 years for Chief Consultants (Codes 201–203), 40 years for Senior Consultants (Codes 301–305), 35 years for Consultants (Codes 401–415), and 28 years for Project Associates (Code 501).

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualification and experience requirements for EdCIL TSG Samagra Shiksha posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess the prescribed Master’s/Professional degrees (such as Master’s in Social Sciences/Education/Computer Science/Management, B.Tech, LLB, CA, ICWA, Data Science qualifications, etc.) with minimum 60% marks wherever specified, along with the required post‑qualification experience ranging from 3 to 10 years depending on the post code and domain (Finance, AI, NCF, Assessment, Infrastructure, Policy, Data, Legal, Mental Health, ICT, etc.).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for EdCIL TSG SS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any of the posts under EdCIL TSG Samagra Shiksha Recruitment 2026; all categories of candidates can apply free of cost through the official EdCIL careers page.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary or fee range for EdCIL TSG Samagra Shiksha Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly fee ranges from Rs. 1,50,000 to Rs. 2,00,000 for the Principal Chief Consultant, Rs. 1,20,000 to Rs. 1,50,000 for Chief Consultants, Rs. 1,00,000 to Rs. 1,20,000 for Senior Consultants, Rs. 80,000 to Rs. 1,00,000 for Consultants, and around Rs. 70,000 per month for Project Associates, as indicated in the official advertisement.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for EdCIL TSG SS Consultant and Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: The selection process comprises shortlisting based on academic and professional qualifications and relevant post‑qualification experience, followed by an Interview for shortlisted candidates; call letters and all further communication will be sent through email only, and a waiting list may be prepared for each post category.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply online for EdCIL TSG Samagra Shiksha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible Indian nationals can apply online only through the EdCIL careers page by visiting the TSG projects recruitment section, selecting the relevant advertisement, and filling the application form with required details and uploading all documents (certificates, experience proofs, photo, resume) in PDF format between 06 May 2026 and 20 May 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any separate resource pool or future opportunity registration for EdCIL TSG SS Project?
faq.answer: Yes, apart from the advertised vacancies, candidates can also register on the Online Resource Pool Portal for TSG at the URL mentioned in the advertisement, which remains active on a rolling basis throughout the year and may be used for future requirements under the Samagra Shiksha and related projects.
